assessor_1_raw: Macro-F1 computed over fixed training-defined label space. Separate rare-code stratum reporting is a design strength. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Hospital random-effect analysis is appropriate for multi-site data. Per-hospital macro-F1 provides granular robustness checks. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Codes below 10 occurrences are excluded from the label space, not evaluated. This is correct - evaluation on extremely rare codes would be numerically unstable. Scope limitation acknowledged. Verdict: defense_wins.
